Size of this PNG preview of this SVG file: 800 × 395 pixels. Other resolutions: 320 × 158 pixels | 640 × 316 pixels | 1,024 × 506 pixels | 1,280 × 632 pixels | 2,560 × 1,265 pixels | 1,423 × 703 pixels.
Original file (SVG file, nominally 1,423 × 703 pixels, file size: 114 KB)
This is a file from the Wikimedia Commons. Information from its description page there is shown below.
Commons is a freely licensed media file repository. You can help.
Summary
DescriptionBugatti Circuit.svg
English: Track map for the Bugatti Circuit. Created with Inkscape. The full 24 Hours of Le Mans circuit is shown in gray with black dots.
Date
6-1-2008
Source
Own work
Author
Will Pittenger
Other versions
Circuit de la Sarthe track map.svg—Image by this author showing the longer 24 Hours of Le Mans cicuit
Circuit Le Mans Bugatti.png—Older PNG with less information
Circuit-Bugatti.png—Older PNG with less information
This W3C-unspecified vector image was created with Inkscape .
Camera location47° 57′ 15″ N, 0° 12′ 38″ E View this and other nearby images on: OpenStreetMap 47.954167; 0.210556
